subcodes.first_line: The ocean of utterance hath surged forth from the Wellspring of the Pen of the All-Merciful in the form of these words: Praise be to God, for We have dwelt beneath the shadow of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحر بیان از معین قلم رحمن بصورت این کلمات ظاهر الحمد لله در ظل عنایت حق بوده و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @development of capacity and readiness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
